_note: Close-up reaction face: the highest-CTR thumbnail format on YouTube. A single face filling most of the frame with an extreme emotion — shock, awe, anger, joy. The face IS the hook. Everything else is background. Pair with a composited title for the full thumbnail.
template: extreme close-up portrait of {subject}, {reaction} facial expression with {reaction_detail}, face filling 70% of the frame, eyes wide and looking at camera, {game} aesthetic in the blurred background, {palette} palette, {lighting}, photorealistic detail on the face, sharp focus on eyes and expression, cinematic depth of field
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry face, closed eyes, looking away, full body, medium shot, generic background, flat lighting, dull expression

lighting: hard flash with catchlights in eyes
vibrant neon glow on one side

rubric.emotion_clarity: 1-5 — is the emotion instantly readable at thumbnail size?
rubric.face_fill: 1-5 — face fills most of the frame?
